name: Iron Cave Golf
about: Iron Cave Golf is an indoor golf simulator venue operating inside OB's Cervezaria in Chenoa and Rury's Tap in South Wilmington. The facility utilizes fully automated golf simulator technology that allows players to practice their swing, play over 100 world-renowned courses, or enjoy target-style games and driving ranges at their own pace. It is designed to be accessible regardless of season or weather, offering a self-contained golfing experience where players control their gameplay. The service is particularly focused on providing a relaxed environment where individuals can improve their game, with an estimated one hour needed to complete an 18-hole course per person.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to over 100 world-renowned golf courses for year-round play
Real-time feedback technology to improve swing mechanics
Conveniently located inside bars with full food and beverage menus available
Flexible scheduling with the ability to play at your own pace
Automated system providing a seamless and self-contained experience

food_and_drink.notes: Vast menu of food available at both host locations (OB's Cervezaria and Rury's Tap)
Full bar service available at both host locations

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify whether clubs are provided or if you must bring your own. It is recommended to contact them directly at 815.992.0815 for details on club rentals or requirements.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, the venue is located inside OB's Cervezaria and Rury's Tap, where you can enjoy a vast menu of food and beverages available at both locations.

faq.question: How much time does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: It is estimated to take one hour for one person to play an 18-hole course on the simulator. For a group of three, you would need to book 3 hours of time if everyone wants to complete 18 holes.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue appears to be kid-friendly as it offers a family-friendly environment with a focus on fun and improvement suitable for various ages.
